name: wnt5a_wnt5b_chr8_chr14
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: wnt5a/wnt5b — non-canonical Wnt, fin morphogenesis. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
